items.caption: A close-up of a computer keyboard with a blue key labeled "trademark" prominently placed in the center. the key is designed with a white trademark symbol (®) and the word "trademark" in white text. the keyboard has black keys with white lettering and symbols, and the keys surrounding the "trademark" key include the "f1" key to the left and the "end" key to the right. the background is blurred, focusing attention on the "trademark" key. a stock photo, likely used to illustrate the concept of trademark law or branding.
